/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--disable-new-dtags CMakeFiles/rc2025_run.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rc2025_run.dir/globals.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rc2025_run.dir/callbacks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rc2025_run.dir/utils.cpp.o
